text.message: Nice set up black and blue
With the coordinated 6s he's not losing it
i passed like 3 times, no cards in 3 orbits
Oj still has uncontested road tho
Ya that kept him from brick port tho
Yall need to get army so can’t
If a 7 rolled he would have lost half cards
I can hold your cards for insurance
Since  u need to take road
I'll trade back on ur turn red
If a 6 rolls he gets it back lol
Blue if you want the game to last trade lol
guys, I understand you had to stop me somehow, but dont you think black is more dangerous now?
that is worse, black, you might have the VPs
We get it, you wanna get the heat off the get road back and win
Since roading passively gets your settle spot anyway
I feel that black might end the game this turn
